2. **gotoempty**: This action lets you go in front of an empty position in the room. You can perform this action anytime, as there are no specific preconditions. After performing it, you will be in front of an empty space.

3. **gotodoor d r1 r2**: This action allows you to go in front of a door d that connects room r1 to room r2. You can only do this if you are in a room that is connected to the door and there is no object blocking the position in front of the door. After performing this action, you will be in front of the door.

4. **gotoroom r1 r2 d**: This action lets you move from room r1 to room r2 using door d. You can only perform this action if you are currently in an adjacent room and the door connecting the two rooms is unlocked. After performing this action, you will be in room r2.

5. **pick x r**: This action allows you to pick up an object x in room r. You can only do this if you are in the same room as the object and you are not currently holding anything. After performing this action, you will be carrying the object, and it will no longer be in the room.

6. **drop x r**: This action lets you drop an object x in room r. You can only do this if you are currently holding the object and the position in front of you is empty. After performing this action, you will no longer be holding the object, and it will be placed in the room.

7. **toggle d**: This action allows you to toggle the state of door d (lock or unlock it). You can only perform this action if you are in front of the door. After performing this action, the door will change its state from locked to unlocked or vice versa.
